entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00229) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00229 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 8021AC-6 "UDRS-ER-OPR INTEGRATION (PLUS CONTRACT CHANGE COSTS)" IN THE AMOUNT OF $71,226.02. THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE WILL BE FROM DATE OF AWARD TO MARCH 31, 2017.
CLIN 8021AC-6 "UDRS-ER-OPR INTEGRATION(PLUS CONTRACT CHANGE COSTS)" FIRM-FIXED-PRICE TOTAL: $71,226.02

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00230) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00226 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD CLINS 8037A "PROCESS SUITE IMPLEMENTATION (PLUS CONTRACT CHANGE COSTS)", 8037B "ENTERPRISE CONTENT MANAGMEENT (OPTIONAL) AND 8037C "TRAVEL" IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $4,267,409.47 AND TO ADD THE RESPECTIVE STATMENT OF WORK.
CLIN 8037A "PROCESS SUITE IMPLEMENTATION (PLUS CONTRACT CHANGE COSTS)" COST-PLUS-FIXED-FEE COST: $2,838,494.93 FEE: $283,847.57 TOTAL: $3,122,342.50
CLIN 8037B "ENTERPRISE CONTENT MANAGMENT (OPTIONAL)" COST-PLUS-FIXED-FEE COST: $1,005,795.58 FEE: $100,578.40 TOTAL: $1,106,373.98
CLIN 8037C "TRAVEL" COST TOTAL: $38,692.99
TOTAL: $4,267,409.47

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
